LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN G. HANLIN MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF PROPERLY EFFECTUATED SUBSTITUTE SERVICE, DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE ACTUAL NOTICE IN TIME TO DEFEND THE ACTION. RELIEF IS GRANTED UNDER CCP SECTION 473.5. DEFENDANT MUST FILE HIS ANSWER NO LATER THAN JULY 27, 2009. THE COURT ADDS, PLAINTIFF SERVED NOTICE ON WRONG LAW FIRM, AND DEFENDANT'S DECL. OF CHLOE JIA LIU IS SUFFICIENT. (THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S REPLY, AS IT WAS FILED LATE.) DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR #3321

Ntc And Mtn To Set Aside Default; Request For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN G. HANLIN Motion to Set Aside Default. Appearances: Anatole Geiche, (415) 752-5565, Plaintiff in Pro Per and opposing party; Joseph Bravo, Esq. of Bravo & Margulies (415) 512-6700, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to set aside default is granted. Although plaintiff properly effectuated substitute service, defendant did not have actual notice in time to defend the action. Relief is granted under CCP section 473.5. Defendant must file his answer no later than July 27, 2009. The Court adds, Plaintiff served Notice on wrong law firm, and Defendant's Decl. of Chloe Jia Liu is sufficient. (The Court does not consider Defendant's reply, as it was filed late.) Defense counsel to prepare proposed Order.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: JoAnn Bryce CSR 3321

Ntc And Mtn To Set Aside Default; Request For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Jun-26-2009 Continued To Jul-23-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN HANLIN Motion to Set Aside Default. Appearances: Anatole Geiche, Plaintiff in Pro Per, (415) 752-5565, appearing and opposing party; Joseph Bravo, Esq. of Bravo Margulies (415) 512-5700, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court continues the hearing to July 23, 2009. Defendant to serve plaintiff pages 2 and 3 of the memorandum, to be provided to Plaintiff by July 2, 2009. Also, Plaintiff is to provide the Court with written opposition to the motion. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
